Class HistoricalPeriod

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.episteme.social.history.HistoricalPeriod
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public class HistoricalPeriod extends ExtensibleEnum
An extensible enumeration of major historical periods.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
